description:
The AudioStreamInterface component is used on AudioStream objects that are spawned in by the user via the dash to allow the engine to interface with the stored audio stream.

This is a favorite-able item. See Favorites.

fields.ItemName: The name of the stream like Frooxius's Stream
fields.SpawningUser: The user that spawned the stream
fields.IsInstance: Whether this interface is being edited or is part of a spawned audio stream.
fields.Source: The audio stream this interfaces with
fields.Bitrate: The Bitrate setting of the spawned audiostream interface (like a UIX)
fields.Volume: The Volume slider/setting of the spawned audio stream interface (like a UIX)
fields.Spatialize: The Spatialize setting of the spawned audio stream interface (like a UIX)

usage: Can be used to make your own audio stream player interface as an inventory favorite
